title: ipomoea palmata var. indica
intro: Ipomoea palmata var. indica, commonly known as the Indian morning glory, is a perennial vine plant native to tropical Asia, known for its attractive blue-purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ipomoea palmata var. indica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
